blockingIssues.description: Vue and Dockerfile support depend on vendored parser C sources that were not committed, so the feature only works after an undocumented `.factory/init.sh` download instead of from a clean checkout.
Clojure support parses files but does not deliver the required symbol extraction; the shipped test was reduced to parse-only coverage.
Common Lisp support likewise lacks working symbol extraction and only has parse-only test coverage.
Standard `.m` MATLAB files still resolve to Objective-C, so the promised MATLAB extension mapping is incomplete for normal source files.
Scheme and Racket extraction branches target node kinds their grammars do not emit, leaving both languages without the required working symbol extraction.
Nginx detection only recognizes a synthetic `.nginx` extension while real `*.conf` Nginx files are still classified as INI, so Nginx stats/filtering behavior is incomplete.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated `.factory/library/environment.md` to record that clean checkouts may require running `.factory/init.sh` to fetch ignored vendored Vue/Dockerfile/Astro grammar sources before the first build.
Updated `.factory/library/architecture.md` with the tree-sitter 0.26 ABI compatibility constraint and examples from the language-expansion work (Clojure orchard, skipped Nim/Hare/Hack candidates).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Tighten the implementation-worker procedure for language additions so workers must either provide explicit `vera index` / `vera stats` / `vera search --lang` evidence or mark `followedProcedure` false when that manual verification is skipped.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Three independent reviews (`lang-tier2a-batch1`, `lang-tier2a-batch2`, and `lang-tier2b-and-finalize`) found the same gap: the worker handoffs claimed `followedProcedure: true` even though the transcript/handoff contained only Cargo validators and no manual CLI verification required by `.factory/skills/implementation-worker/SKILL.md`.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Relax or clarify the implementation-worker's strict test-first rule for grammar/dependency work so workers can perform required tree-sitter compatibility research before writing tests without being marked as deviating from procedure.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The `lang-tier1b-structural` review found the feature needed ABI/dependency investigation before tests were knowable, but `.factory/skills/implementation-worker/SKILL.md` still presents the step as strictly TDD-first.

rejectedObservations.observation: The repeated hidden-bootstrap observations from `lang-tier1b-structural` and `lang-tier2b-and-finalize` were not escalated as guidance changes.
Multiple tree-sitter ABI compatibility observations were not duplicated in suggested guidance updates.
